hero.title:
School management
that actually works
hero.subtitle: A complete open source platform to manage educational institutions — from small training centers to national public networks.

problem.title: Say goodbye to Excel spreadsheets
problem.sub: Modern and professional school management, without daily hassles.
problem.card1_desc: No more disorganized spreadsheets, conflicting versions, and lost data. Centralize everything on a secure platform.
problem.card2_desc: Eliminate manual gradebook work. Automate grade calculations, averages, and academic reports.
problem.card3_desc: Reduce hours of administrative work. Automate enrollments, payments, and communication with guardians.

modules.title: Modules
modules.sub: Integrated systems for the complete management of your institution.

features.title:
Everything you need
to manage your institution

architecture.title:
It's not just what it does.
It's how it's designed.

principles.modular_desc: Each institution activates only the modules it needs. You don't pay for features you don't use. You're not forced to implement everything at once.
principles.modular_badge: ✓ Pay only for what you use
principles.scalability_desc: The same platform that serves a small vocational training center can serve a national public education system. It grows with you.
principles.security_desc: Granular permission control, your data under your total control, and architecture prepared for on-premise and cloud environments.

interface.title:
See the platform
in action
interface.sub: A clean and familiar interface, built on Tryton — ready for immediate use.
interface.feat1_desc: Complete schedule management per class, with daily visualization of all subjects and class periods.
interface.feat2_desc: Associate students, teachers, and study plans with each class. Support for multiple academic years and modalities.
interface.feat3_desc: Differentiated access for students, teachers, administrative staff, management, and administrators.

audience.title: Who is SAGE Edu for?
audience.card1_desc: Complete and professional management for private educational institutions.
audience.card2_desc: Scalable solution for public education networks and central administration.
audience.card3_desc: Accessible tool for non-profit organizations in the educational sector.
audience.card4_desc: Support for community educational projects and local initiatives.

demo.title: See for yourself
demo.sub: Public demo server with different access profiles.
demo.cta_desc: Explore SAGE Edu with different profiles — from student to administrator. Discover how each user interacts with the platform in their daily life.

support.title: Need Help?
support.desc: Our team is available to support your institution in implementing and using SAGE Edu.

opensource.title: 100% Open Source
opensource.desc1: SAGE Edu is fully open source and built on Tryton, a modular and robust ERP framework. Transparent code, no licensing costs, and total control over your data.
opensource.desc2: A global community of developers supports the project and ensures continuous evolution — without relying on external vendors.

pricing.title:
Free software.
Tailored support.
pricing.sub: SAGE Education is and will continue to be free. But we know that technology alone is rarely enough.
pricing.services_desc: Our team accompanies your institution at every stage — from installation to complete digital transformation.
pricing.service1_desc: Complete setup adapted to the institution's infrastructure.
pricing.service2_desc: Training for administrative and technical internal teams.
pricing.service3_desc: Development of modules for specific regulatory contexts.
pricing.service4_desc: Continuous technical support to ensure continuity.
pricing.service5_desc: The institution's technical team learns to maintain and evolve the system.
pricing.service6_desc: Educational digital transformation aligned with institutional goals.
pricing.services_note: We don't work with fixed price lists. Each institution has its own budgetary, technical, and geographic reality. Our process always starts with a conversation.

community.title:
There's a place for you
in this community.
community.desc: SAGE Education is not just a software project. It's a project built on conviction. And convictions grow when they are shared.
community.cta1_desc: Explore the platform with different user profiles. No registration.
community.cta2_desc: Talk to us about your institution's reality. No obligation.
community.cta3_desc: Code, documentation, testing, or feedback — every contribution counts.
community.quote:
"Building sustainable education systems is not an individual effort.
It's a collective responsibility."
